note: BUG-164 FIXED (GLB_XFAIL_BURNDOWN_DESIGN.md P4/D3): render_scene now binds one sampler per map family (base/normal/mr/occlusion/emissive), each built from that glTF texture's own wrapS/wrapT/filter instead of one scene-wide hardcoded REPEAT sampler. This asset's 10 materials use the SAME source textures under DIFFERENT samplers (clamp/repeat/mirror per S/T axis) -- the per-quadrant divergence in the golden IS the proof; single-sided vs double-sided (unrelated to D3) is expected to differ per the asset's own design.

BUG-165 FIXED (GLB_XFAIL_BURNDOWN_DESIGN.md P1): root cause was node.orbit_camera's fixed near=0.05 clip plane clipping this real-world-scale (radius 0.017) object entirely, not a texture-decode race — see gltf_import.rs's near_clip computation

re-diagnosed 2026-07-16 (P1): NOT the same root cause as BoomBox — BoomBox's fix (near-clip scaling) does not converge VirtualCity, which has 167 materials/147 textures still not converging after 60 frames with io_pending false (a genuine, separate throughput/decode issue). Needs its own diagnosis; do not assume BUG-165's fix covers it.

BUG-166 FIXED (GLB_XFAIL_BURNDOWN_DESIGN.md P2): import_glb() replaces gltf::import() with a slice-based parse gated on MANIFOLD's own extensionsRequired allowlist (includes KHR_materials_clearcoat) instead of the crate's feature-flag veto; clearcoat render mapping was already shipped by GLB_CONFORMANCE_DESIGN

BUG-166 FIXED (GLB_XFAIL_BURNDOWN_DESIGN.md P2): import_glb()'s own extensionsRequired allowlist (includes KHR_materials_unlit) replaces the crate's feature-flag veto, so this now imports and renders. KHR_materials_unlit itself is not yet wired to the UnlitMaterial primitive (tracked separately as BUG-174) — this asset renders via the default lit path, not true unlit shading.

BUG-167 FIXED (GLB_XFAIL_BURNDOWN_DESIGN.md P3/D2): KHR_materials_pbrSpecularGlossiness converts to metal-rough at import (diffuseFactor/diffuseTexture->base color, glossinessFactor->roughness, specularFactor(mean)->specular_factor). KNOWN LIMITATION (not a regression, a named Deferred item, doc section 8): the specularGlossinessTexture's RGB specular TINT is not sampled (deferred — needs a shader change) — on THIS asset the spec-gloss bottle half is visibly darker/less saturated than its metal-rough twin because the tint carries the gold color the deferred map would supply. The two halves no longer look broken (both render, both are lit, both show the logo/geometry) but are not yet pixel-alike. Revival trigger named in the doc is now empirically met by this exact asset.

BUG-168 FIXED (GLB_XFAIL_BURNDOWN_DESIGN.md P4/D6): EXT_mesh_gpu_instancing parsed via raw-JSON sniff (no typed support in gltf 1.4.1); each instance's TRANSLATION/ROTATION/SCALE composes with the node's own world transform and bakes a separate world-space copy into the SAME per-material combined mesh at flatten time -- zero new code in the render/graph-assembly path (v1 expands to N wired copies, not true GPU instancing, per D6's explicit rejection of render_instanced_3d_mesh). 125 instances render as 125 visibly distinct cubes; object_count stays 1 (one render_scene object, one combined 4500-vertex mesh) since instancing never adds materials -- OBJECT_SAFETY_MAX's trigger condition (deferred) does not apply here.

BUG-169 FIXED (GLB_XFAIL_BURNDOWN_DESIGN.md P1): NOT a texture-less-material/lighting bug — same root cause as BUG-165, node.orbit_camera's fixed near=0.05 clip plane clipping this small-scale (radius 0.0056) object entirely — see gltf_import.rs's near_clip computation
gltf crate 'missing field node' parse failure (KHR_animation_pointer/KHR_node_visibility)
gltf crate 'missing field node' parse failure (KHR_animation_pointer/KHR_node_visibility)
gltf crate 'missing field node' parse failure (KHR_animation_pointer/KHR_node_visibility)

BUG-171 PARTIALLY FIXED (GLB_XFAIL_BURNDOWN_DESIGN.md P3/D4): the materialless primitive is no longer silently dropped -- it gets the glTF spec default material (base color white, metallic 1.0, roughness 1.0) and imports/renders as one object (previously errored 'no materials with geometry'). KNOWN GAP, ESCALATED (not implemented this phase): COLOR_0 (per-vertex color) is NOT read anywhere in the mesh pipeline -- MeshVertex (crates/manifold-renderer/src/generators/mesh_common.rs) has no color field, and it is the shared GPU vertex format for ~30 node-graph primitives/shaders, not gltf-import-local. Adding a color channel is a structural ABI change (MeshVertex size/layout, MESH_VERTEX_SPECS, every WGSL 'struct Vertex' hand-copy) beyond this phase's scope per DESIGN_DOC_STANDARD.md's escalate-line ('changing a public API shape the doc doesn't specify') -- escalated to BUG-175 rather than improvised. This box currently renders as a flat uniform gray box, NOT with its per-vertex colors.
BUG-172 FIXED (GLB_XFAIL_BURNDOWN_DESIGN.md P2, D5): missing default_scene now falls back to the union of all scenes' roots via the shared scene-fallback helper
10,000 materials exceeds OBJECT_SAFETY_MAX by design (D4) — not a defect
